channel.title: 链聘 ChainHire · 最新 Web3 岗位
channel.description: Web3 / crypto 行业全职能最新公开招聘，每日自动更新。

item.title: Smart Contract Engineer · Aragon
item.description: 合规/托管/其他 · 中级 · Remote · 面议。3+ yrs Solidity; build custom integrations on Aragon OSx protocol for clients; expert smart contract security and open-source blockchain contributions.

item.title: Senior Smart Contract Developer · Aragon
item.description: 合规/托管/其他 · 资深/Staff · Remote · $72k–$84k/yr。5+ yrs Solidity; build and shape Aragon OSx protocol; mastery of Ethereum EIPs, ENS, account abstraction, L2 solutions.

item.title: Engineering Lead · Aragon
item.description: 合规/托管/其他 · 负责人/总监 · Remote · 面议。Cross-functional engineering lead on Aragon Platform Team; senior depth in frontend (JS/TS/React) or backend (Node/TS); CI/CD, monitoring, prior tech lead exper

item.title: Senior QA Engineer - Web3 · Xsolla
item.description: 合规/托管/其他 · 资深/Staff · Remote · 面议。Senior QA for Web3 gaming features; validate blockchain interactions, wallet flows (MetaMask, WalletConnect), smart contract events, on-chain/off-chain data syn

item.title: Ecosystem Partnerships Lead Web3 · Xsolla
item.description: 合规/托管/其他 · 资深/Staff · Remote (US) · 面议。3+ yrs Web3 BD/ecosystem partnerships; drive adoption of Xsolla ZK gaming ecosystem; knowledge of zero-knowledge tech and token incentive models.

item.title: Ecosystem Partnership Lead Web3 (EMEA) · Xsolla
item.description: 合规/托管/其他 · 资深/Staff · Remote (Europe) · $111k–$130k/yr。3+ yrs Web3 BD; lead Xsolla ZK ecosystem partnerships in EMEA region; deep knowledge of Web3 gaming, ZK infrastructure, token incentive models.

item.title: Product Engineer (Full Stack) · CoinTracker
item.description: 合规/托管/其他 · 中级 · Remote (US) · 面议。Full-stack engineer for crypto portfolio tracking and tax compliance platform; CoinTracker tracks $80B+ in crypto and has generated 1M+ tax forms.

item.title: Head of Finance · CoinTracker
item.description: 合规/托管/其他 · 负责人/总监 · Remote (US) · 面议。Lead CoinTracker through first financial audit; manage financial statement reporting for crypto portfolio tracking platform with $80B+ in assets tracked.

item.title: Product Design (Wallet Platform) · Phantom
item.description: 钱包/DeFi · 中级 · Remote · 面议。Design wallet platform UX for Phantom, the leading multi-chain crypto wallet used by millions; turn complex web3 concepts into simple, beautiful experiences.

item.title: Smart Contract Triager · Immunefi
item.description: 合规/托管/其他 · 中级 · Remote · 面议。Review and reproduce smart contract vulnerability reports on Immunefi's bug bounty platform; deep understanding of Solidity, DLTs, and common vulnerability patt

item.title: Senior Web3 Software Engineer · Fuel Labs
item.description: 公链/L2 · 资深/Staff · Remote · 面议。5+ yrs engineering, 2+ yrs Web3/blockchain; build high-performance dApps on Fuel VM; React/Next.js/TypeScript, ethers.js/viem/wagmi, on-chain integrations.

item.title: Senior Front-End Engineer · Fuel Labs
item.description: 公链/L2 · 资深/Staff · Remote · 面议。Senior frontend engineer for Fuel Labs blockchain stack; React/TypeScript, Web3 libraries (ethers.js/viem/wagmi), DeFi product experience, 5+ yrs.

item.title: Senior DevOps Engineer · Fuel Labs
item.description: 公链/L2 · 资深/Staff · Remote · $84k–$100k/yr。Senior DevOps for Fuel Labs blockchain infrastructure; Terraform/Kubernetes/CI-CD; Solidity/Rust node operations experience required.

item.title: Rust Engineer · Fuel Labs
item.description: 公链/L2 · 中级 · Remote · 面议。Rust engineer for Fuel VM/Sway language tooling and blockchain core infrastructure; contribute to protocol development.

item.title: DeFi Growth Lead · Trust Wallet

item.title: Product Manager - Web3 / DeFi · Trust Wallet
item.description: 钱包/DeFi · 中级 · Remote · $63k–$110k/yr。Shape and grow Trust Wallet's DeFi & Earn product suite (staking, yield farming, on-chain earn); 200M+ user base across 100+ blockchains.

item.title: Developer Relations Manager (Whitechain) · WhiteBIT
item.description: 交易所 · 中级 · Remote / Europe · 面议。2-3 yrs blockchain industry; expand Whitechain (EVM) developer adoption; travel to hackathons and conferences; excellent soft skills and technical background.
